title: Update phone number to +91 9917417861 across entire website

requirements.summary: Replace all occurrences of the old phone number (+91 96904 17361 / +919690417361) with the new number (+91 9917417861) across all frontend components, ensuring tel: links and WhatsApp URLs are updated correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar displays +91 9917417861 and any tel: link uses tel:+919917417861
Hero section Call Now button uses tel:+919917417861
Hero section WhatsApp button uses https://wa.me/919917417861
FloatingActionButtons Call button href is tel:+919917417861
FloatingActionButtons WhatsApp button href is https://wa.me/919917417861
BookingContact section displays +91 9917417861 and post-submission WhatsApp CTA opens https://wa.me/919917417861
Footer displays +91 9917417861 and any WhatsApp/call link uses the new number
No instance of the old number (96904 17361 / 919690417361) exists anywhere in the frontend source files
Tapping the WhatsApp button opens a WhatsApp chat with the correct new number

file_operations.description: Update the phone number display from +91 96904 17361 to +91 9917417861 and ensure any tel: link uses tel:+919917417861
Update the Call Now CTA button href from tel:+919690417361 to tel:+919917417861 and the WhatsApp CTA button href from https://wa.me/919690417361 to https://wa.me/919917417861
Update the Call button href from tel:+919690417361 to tel:+919917417861 and the WhatsApp button href from https://wa.me/919690417361 to https://wa.me/919917417861
Update the displayed phone number from +91 96904 17361 to +91 9917417861 and update the post-submission WhatsApp CTA link from https://wa.me/919690417361 to https://wa.me/919917417861
Update the phone number display from +91 96904 17361 to +91 9917417861 and ensure any tel: or WhatsApp links use the new number (tel:+919917417861 and https://wa.me/919917417861)
Update the contact phone number display from +91 96904 17361 to +91 9917417861
